title: Mallorca Yacht Charter 2026: Guide to Costs, Boats and Marinas
html:
Mallorca offers some of the best yacht charter in the Mediterranean, with departures from Puerto Portals and prices starting around €400 for a half-day motorboat. BoatHire24 connects you with verified boat owners so you can compare options and book with confidence.

Where to set off in Mallorca

Most charters begin at one of the island's well-equipped marinas. Puerto Portals is the most prestigious, a short drive from Palma and home to superyachts and chic waterfront restaurants. Port Adriano, designed by Philippe Starck, offers modern facilities and easy access to the southwest coast. Further east, Cala d'Or marina is ideal for exploring the rocky coves of the southeast. For those wanting to head north, the port of Alcúdia provides a gateway to the beautiful bays of Pollença and Formentor. The capital, Palma, has several marinas including Real Club Náutico de Palma and Marina Port de Mallorca, both offering a wide range of charter boats.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Mallorca?

Boat hire in Mallorca ranges from €300 for a small motorboat half-day to €5,000+ for a crewed superyacht per day. Prices vary by season, boat size, and whether you need a captain. You can book a charter online through BoatHire24, where many listings include fuel, insurance, and VAT.

  • Shared tour (RIB or small catamaran, 2, 4 hours): from €80 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests, no licence required): from €350
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests, crewed): from €1,400
  • Crewed yacht full-day (up to 8 guests, with skipper and hostess): from €2,200

Which boat to rent

  1. Motorboat, best for short trips and exploring coves; seats 6, 8 guests; from €400 half-day
  2. Sailing yacht, ideal for a full-day sail with friends; sleeps 6, 10; from €800 day charter
  3. Catamaran, spacious and stable for families; up to 12 guests; from €1,200 full-day
  4. Luxury motor yacht, for special occasions; includes crew, like the Fairline Targa 43; from €1,500 per day, check this motor yacht listing for details

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Mallorca?

In Spanish waters, a licence is generally required to skipper a boat over 6 metres in length, but many charters include a captain. For small boats under 6 metres and with limited engine power, your domestic driving licence may be accepted, but the operator will confirm exact requirements at the time of booking.

For a relaxed day on the water in Mallorca, hire a crewed boat so you can focus on swimming, snorkelling and lunching at a cala like Cala Llombards, the skipper handles the anchoring and the paperwork.

Season and best time to go

The high season runs from June to September, when the weather is hottest and the sea calm. The prevailing wind, the Embat, blows from the south-west most afternoons. Spring and autumn offer quieter conditions and lower prices. Many boats are available from April to October, with some year-round options for the hardy.

At a glance

  • Price range: €300, €5,000 per day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Guest capacity: 6, 12 on most charters
  • Currency: EUR
  • Popular departure points: Puerto Portals, Port Adriano, Palma, Alcúdia

Questions about boat rental in Mallorca

Can I rent a boat without a licence in Mallorca?

Yes, you can rent small motorboats up to 6 metres in length without a licence, and many owners offer a skipper option for larger vessels.

What is the best area to sail in Mallorca?

The southwest coast, from Port Adriano to the Cabrera Archipelago, has sheltered coves and clear water, while the north coast offers dramatic cliffs near Formentor.

How far is it from Palma to the Cabrera islands?

The Cabrera Archipelago National Park lies about 50 nautical miles south of Palma, a scenic two-hour sail from most south-coast marinas.

Do I need to book in advance for Mallorca yacht charter?

Yes, especially in July and August, when popular boats are booked weeks ahead. BoatHire24 lets you check availability and secure your date online.

Whether you are planning a family day trip or a week-long luxury cruise, Mallorca's charter market has something for every budget. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Mallorca or list your own. Owners can browse the listings to see how easy it is to become a host and earn extra income from your boat.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Mallorca and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
